overrides.name: Aggressive Mammoth
overrides.oracleText:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Other creatures you control have trample.
overrides.gameText:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the defending player.)
Other creatures you control have trample.
overrides.changeApplied: Referencia a planeswalker eliminada. Reminder de trample adaptado para dañar al jugador defensor.

overrides.name: Battle-Rattle Shaman
overrides.oracleText: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may have target creature get +2/+0 until end of turn.
overrides.gameText: At the end of the combat positioning step, target attacking creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
overrides.changeApplied: Texto adaptado: disparo obligatorio al final del posicionamiento; solo puede hacer objetivo a una criatura propia en posición de ataque.

overrides.name: Bear Cub
overrides.changeApplied: Sin texto Oracle.

overrides.name: Beast-Kin Ranger
overrides.oracleText:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
overrides.gameText:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the defending player.)
Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
overrides.changeApplied: Referencia a planeswalker eliminada. Reminder de trample adaptado para dañar al jugador defensor.

overrides.name: Bite Down
overrides.oracleText: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.
overrides.gameText: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
overrides.changeApplied: Referencia a planeswalker eliminada.

overrides.name: Brineborn Cutthroat
overrides.oracleText:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
overrides.gameText:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Whenever you cast an instant spell or a spell with flash, put a +1/+1 counter on Brineborn Cutthroat.
overrides.changeApplied: Texto adaptado: el contador se obtiene al lanzar instantáneos o hechizos con flash, independientemente de la prioridad atacante.

overrides.name: Deadly Plot
overrides.oracleText:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature or planeswalker.
• Return target Zombie creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
overrides.gameText:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature.
• Return target Zombie creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
overrides.changeApplied: Referencia a planeswalker eliminada.

overrides.name: Eaten Alive
overrides.oracleText:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {3}{B}.
Exile target creature or planeswalker.
overrides.gameText:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {3}{B}.
Exile target creature.
overrides.changeApplied: Referencia a planeswalker eliminada.

overrides.name: Eaten by Piranhas
overrides.oracleText:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a black Skeleton creature with base power and toughness 1/1. (It loses all other colors, card types, and creature types.)
overrides.gameText:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 1/1.
overrides.changeApplied: Texto simplificado: se descartan cambios de color, tipo y subtipo; mantiene pérdida de habilidades y base 1/1.

overrides.name: Elspeth's Smite
overrides.oracleText: Elspeth's Smite deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
overrides.gameText: Elspeth's Smite deals 3 damage to target attacking or defending creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
overrides.changeApplied: Objetivo 'blocking' adaptado a criatura en defensa.

overrides.name: Fire Elemental
overrides.changeApplied: Sin texto Oracle.

overrides.name: Frenzied Goblin
overrides.oracleText: Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {R}. If you do, target creature can't block this turn.
overrides.gameText: Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {R}. If you do, target creature can't be assigned as a blocker this turn.
overrides.changeApplied: Restricción de bloqueo adaptada a asignación de bloqueador.

overrides.name: Goblin Smuggler
overrides.oracleText:
Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
{T}: Another target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.
overrides.gameText:
Haste (This creature can attack and use {T} abilities even if it entered this turn.)
{T}: Another target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.
overrides.changeApplied: Reminder de haste adaptado al mareo de invocación del juego.

overrides.name: Hero's Downfall
overrides.changeApplied: Referencia a planeswalker eliminada.

overrides.name: Highborn Vampire
overrides.changeApplied: Sin texto Oracle.

overrides.name: Joraga Invocation
overrides.oracleText: Each creature you control gets +3/+3 until end of turn and must be blocked this turn if able.
overrides.gameText: Each creature you control gets +3/+3 until end of turn and must be assigned a blocker this turn if able.
overrides.changeApplied: Obligación de bloqueo adaptada al algoritmo de asignación de bloqueadores.

overrides.name: Leonin Vanguard
overrides.oracleText: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control three or more creatures, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn and you gain 1 life.
overrides.gameText: At the beginning of combat, if you control three or more creatures, Leonin Vanguard gets +1/+1 until end of turn and you gain 1 life.
overrides.changeApplied: Texto adaptado: se dispara al comienzo de todos los combates, no solo con prioridad atacante.

overrides.name: Pacifism
overrides.oracleText:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature can't attack or block.
overrides.gameText:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature can't attack or defend.
overrides.changeApplied: Restricción de bloqueo adaptada a posición de defensa.

overrides.name: Quick-Draw Katana
overrides.oracleText:
During your turn, equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has first strike. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
overrides.gameText:
Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has first strike while it's attacking. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)

Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
overrides.changeApplied: Texto adaptado: el bonus y first strike solo se aplican si la criatura equipada está en posición de ataque.

overrides.name: Savannah Lions
overrides.changeApplied: Sin texto Oracle.

overrides.name: Scorching Dragonfire
overrides.oracleText: Scorching Dragonfire deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that creature or planeswalker would die this turn, exile it instead.
overrides.gameText: Scorching Dragonfire deals 3 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
overrides.changeApplied: Referencia a planeswalker eliminada.

overrides.name: Starlight Snare
overrides.oracleText:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.
overrides.gameText:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. (The untap step happens during final cleanup.)
overrides.changeApplied: Aclaración: el untap step queda definido dentro de la limpieza final.

overrides.name: Stromkirk Bloodthief
overrides.oracleText: At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target Vampire you control.
overrides.gameText: At the beginning of the end step, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target Vampire you control.
overrides.changeApplied: Texto adaptado: se dispara al comienzo de la fase final de todos los turnos generales.

overrides.name: Swab Goblin
overrides.changeApplied: Sin texto Oracle.
